description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house surrounded by dense, mature trees and lush landscaping, providing privacy and a natural setting. The structure features clean lines, large windows, and an open layout, with multiple outdoor living spaces including a pool and patio area. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level partially set back and integrated into the landscape. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, likely stucco or concrete, with some wood or metal accents visible. The property includes a driveway and a main entryway that is subtly integrated into the facade, emphasizing minimalism and functionality. The overall design prioritizes indoor-outdoor living, with expansive glass doors and seamless transitions between interior and exterior spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and extensive landscaping, featuring a pool and multiple outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the house's flat roofs, central pool, and dense tree coverage surrounding the property.
description_view_1: Side elevation highlighting the house's horizontal lines, large windows, and the landscaped yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the outdoor patio, pool area, and open-plan living spaces with direct access to the garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side elevation showing additional windows, secondary entry points, and the integration of the house with the surrounding greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entryway with flush door, no porch, and integrated into the facade, surrounded by landscaping and possibly a small overhang.
